unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/

function.name: Curl_dyn_init

unit.comment: /* * free the buffer and re-init the necessary fields. It doesn't touch the * 'init' field and thus this buffer can be reused to add data to again. */

function.name: dyn_nappend
function.parameter_list: (struct dynbuf *s, const unsigned char *mem, size_t len)

unit.comment: /* * Clears the string, keeps the allocation. This can also be called on a * buffer that already was freed. */

function.name: Curl_dyn_reset

unit.comment: /* * Specify the size of the tail to keep (number of bytes from the end of the * buffer). The rest will be dropped. */

function.name: Curl_dyn_tail
Curl_dyn_addn
Curl_dyn_add
Curl_dyn_vaddf
Curl_dyn_addf
Curl_dyn_ptr
Curl_dyn_uptr
Curl_dyn_len
Curl_dyn_setlen
